function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle
alias: hearthline_sensor_bundle
purchased_on: 2026-01-31
total_eur: 50
counterparty: Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH
project: Hearthline
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: Zigbee door sensors
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 36
  - item: AAA rechargeable set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 14
    line_eur: 14
---
# Door and hallway sensor bundle

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.hearthline_sensor_bundle |
| alias          | hearthline_sensor_bundle      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-01-31                    |
| total_eur      | 50                            |
| counterparty   | Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH     |
| project        | Hearthline                    |
| related_entity | Juniper                       |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                 | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | Zigbee door sensors  | 2   | 18       | 36       |
| 2 | AAA rechargeable set | 1   | 14       | 14       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                |     |          | 50       |
+---+----------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Needed to test whether household events could be summarized without making the house feel creepy.

function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item and OCR-structured all Juniper-related bills by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, read relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved full original bodies beneath new frontmatter per migration discipline, and deleted inbox item after successful completion per inbox workflow update.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to OCR all bills related to Juniper. Search and reads identified three matching purchase records, each containing related_entity=Juniper. Each file was updated in place with bill-schema YAML frontmatter (record_type, bill_id, alias, purchased_on, total_eur, counterparty, project, related_entity, lines) extracted from visible note data, with original body retained verbatim. After completion, the inbox item was deleted as required by process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update.
